news.title:
Union Bank issues ₹7,500 Cr long-term bonds for infra, housing.
Bonds are 10-year, 7.16% coupon rate, CARE/ICRA AAA-rated, listed on NSE.
news.summary:
Union Bank issues ₹7,500 Cr long-term bonds for infra, housing.
Bonds are 10-year, 7.16% coupon rate, CARE/ICRA AAA-rated, listed on NSE.

news.title:
Kotak Mahindra Bank, SBI, Tata Motors, LIC Housing Finance, Union Bank highlighted.
Focus includes corporate announcements and IPO details for trading session.
news.summary:
Kotak Mahindra Bank, SBI, Tata Motors, LIC Housing Finance, Union Bank highlighted.
Focus includes corporate announcements and IPO details for trading session.

news.title:
Union Bank raised ₹3,000 crore via bonds; green shoe option expands potential to ₹7,500 crore.
Ashok Leyland to invest ₹375 crore in UK subsidiary; Tata Motors PV to hike ICE vehicle prices by 0.5% from April 2026.
news.summary:
Union Bank raised ₹3,000 crore via bonds; green shoe option expands potential to ₹7,500 crore.
Ashok Leyland to invest ₹375 crore in UK subsidiary; Tata Motors PV to hike ICE vehicle prices by 0.5% from April 2026.

news.title:
Bombay HC quashes DRT's stay on post-sale process of a mortgaged flat auctioned by Union Bank of India.
HC noted borrowers and defaulters often delay recovery by taking no action during the bank's process.
news.summary:
Bombay HC quashes DRT's stay on post-sale process of a mortgaged flat auctioned by Union Bank of India.
HC noted borrowers and defaulters often delay recovery by taking no action during the bank's process.

news.title:
Union Bank of India received ₹93.8B in bids from qualified institutional buyers.
The bank accepted ₹30B in bonds with a 7.16% coupon rate.
news.summary:
Union Bank of India received ₹93.8B in bids from qualified institutional buyers.
The bank accepted ₹30B in bonds with a 7.16% coupon rate.

news.title:
Union Bank of India plans ₹25,000 crore bond issuance, including ₹7,500 crore by March 2026.
Q3 FY26 net profit rose 9% YoY to ₹5,017 crore; shares gained 15% YTD, up 55% in a year.
news.summary:
Union Bank of India plans ₹25,000 crore bond issuance, including ₹7,500 crore by March 2026.
Q3 FY26 net profit rose 9% YoY to ₹5,017 crore; shares gained 15% YTD, up 55% in a year.

news.title:
Union Bank approves ₹20,000 crore bonds for infra, housing.
Plans ₹7,500 crore over 10 years; ₹5,000 crore for green bonds.
news.summary:
Union Bank approves ₹20,000 crore bonds for infra, housing.
Plans ₹7,500 crore over 10 years; ₹5,000 crore for green bonds.

news.title:
Union Bank of India report highlights Indian rupee hitting Rs 92.48/USD due to global tensions.
Geopolitical risks, crude price hikes, and capital flows may drive volatility; strong forex buffers to shield INR.
news.summary:
Union Bank of India report highlights Indian rupee hitting Rs 92.48/USD due to global tensions.
Geopolitical risks, crude price hikes, and capital flows may drive volatility; strong forex buffers to shield INR.

news.title:
CARE Ratings reaffirmed Union Bank's bond ratings citing strong capitalization, govt ownership, and improved asset quality.
Stable outlook noted; systemic importance and market position emphasized with no downgrade triggers identified.
news.summary:
CARE Ratings reaffirmed Union Bank's bond ratings citing strong capitalization, govt ownership, and improved asset quality.
Stable outlook noted; systemic importance and market position emphasized with no downgrade triggers identified.

news.title:
CBI interrogates Jai Anmol Ambani in ₹228 cr fraud case linked to Reliance Home Finance.
He was questioned for 6.5 hours at CBI HQ in New Delhi.
news.summary:
CBI interrogates Jai Anmol Ambani in ₹228 cr fraud case linked to Reliance Home Finance.
He was questioned for 6.5 hours at CBI HQ in New Delhi.

news.title:
ICRA reaffirmed Union Bank's AAA Stable rating for Tier II bonds.
AAA Stable assigned to infra bonds; healthy earnings, stable asset quality cited.
news.summary:
ICRA reaffirmed Union Bank's AAA Stable rating for Tier II bonds.
AAA Stable assigned to infra bonds; healthy earnings, stable asset quality cited.

news.title:
Union Bank schedules meeting on 16 March 2026 to approve issuance of long-term bonds.
Bonds target infrastructure, housing, green projects to raise non-capital funds for development.
news.summary:
Union Bank schedules meeting on 16 March 2026 to approve issuance of long-term bonds.
Bonds target infrastructure, housing, green projects to raise non-capital funds for development.

news.title:
Union Bank of India held an investor meet with UBS Global Asset Management, Singapore on 26th Feb 2026.
The bank referred to publicly available documents during the one-on-one physical meeting in Mumbai.
news.summary:
Union Bank of India held an investor meet with UBS Global Asset Management, Singapore on 26th Feb 2026.
The bank referred to publicly available documents during the one-on-one physical meeting in Mumbai.

news.title:
Fitch affirms Union Bank of India's Long-Term IDR at BBB with stable outlook.
Viability Rating upgraded to bb from bb-; improved financials and asset quality cited.
news.summary:
Fitch affirms Union Bank of India's Long-Term IDR at BBB with stable outlook.
Viability Rating upgraded to bb from bb-; improved financials and asset quality cited.

news.title:
PSBs surpass private banks as quarterly profits reach new highs.
Only 3 of 30 listed universal banks had >1% net NPAs in Q3.
news.summary:
PSBs surpass private banks as quarterly profits reach new highs.
Only 3 of 30 listed universal banks had >1% net NPAs in Q3.

news.title:
Foreign investors increase stakes in PSU banks despite $19B outflows in 2025, attracted by low valuations and rising profits.
Banks like Bank of Maharashtra, Union Bank, and Canara Bank hit FPI ownership highs, with PSU Bank index rallying 60% over the year.
news.summary:
Foreign investors increase stakes in PSU banks despite $19B outflows in 2025, attracted by low valuations and rising profits.
Banks like Bank of Maharashtra, Union Bank, and Canara Bank hit FPI ownership highs, with PSU Bank index rallying 60% over the year.

news.title:
Union Bank of India schedules an investor/analyst meet with JPMorgan Asset Management on 20-Feb-2026 in London.
The meet will be in-person, with no unpublished price-sensitive information shared, using publicly available data.
news.summary:
Union Bank of India schedules an investor/analyst meet with JPMorgan Asset Management on 20-Feb-2026 in London.
The meet will be in-person, with no unpublished price-sensitive information shared, using publicly available data.

news.title:
RBI imposed a ₹2.8 lakh penalty on Union Bank of India for issues like mutilated notes, note shortages, and CCTV lapses.
The penalty was received on Feb 10, 2026; the bank stated the impact is not significant and measures are in place.
news.summary:
RBI imposed a ₹2.8 lakh penalty on Union Bank of India for issues like mutilated notes, note shortages, and CCTV lapses.
The penalty was received on Feb 10, 2026; the bank stated the impact is not significant and measures are in place.

news.title: Kallam Textiles Ltd gets notices from Union Bank for selling spinning and hydel units.
news.summary: Kallam Textiles Ltd gets notices from Union Bank for selling spinning and hydel units.

news.title:
Union Bank of India’s valuation upgraded to 'very attractive' due to robust metrics.
The bank’s performance outpaces benchmarks like the Sensex, boosting investor confidence.
news.summary:
Union Bank of India’s valuation upgraded to 'very attractive' due to robust metrics.
The bank’s performance outpaces benchmarks like the Sensex, boosting investor confidence.
